pageContext.name: Rick and Morty 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Come along on wild escapades with Rick and Morty.  We are super pumped to announce a new 1oz pure silver coin for Rick and Morty! The series follows the reckless scientist, Rick Sanchez and his good-hearted, but dim-witted grandson, Morty Smith, who go on interdimensional adventures.  This outlandish piece showcases a colored image of Rick and Morty causing a ruckus, which contrasts wonderfully with the mirror finish background. The engraving of Rick's spaceship, The Space Cruiser adds extra appeal to the design. The obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Queen Elizabeth II, which verifies the coin as legal tender.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the packaging is custom designed, incorporating further artwork of the granddad and grandson duo. Printed at the back of the box is a Certificate of Authenticity and the coin's unique serial number in the limited mintage of just 3,000 coins.   Wreak mayhem with Rick and Morty today!
